Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances user experience by presenting more relevant content first.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAppChatReloadMessagesOnTrustedConnectionRTN_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Refreshes chat messages when a secure connection is established.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures players receive the latest messages quickly and securely.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePacksFallbackReferenceManaged_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Provides a backup reference for texture packs if the main one fails.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Ensures players still see textures correctly even if there are issues with the primary pack.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePriorityBasedOnDistance_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Prioritizes loading textures based on how close players are to them.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Improves visual quality and performance by loading important textures first.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks the version of the codebase using a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic strings to update their timestamps without needing to reload.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see the latest information without interruptions.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagExplorerStreaming3
Changed_Other.mechanism: Improves how the Explorer tool loads and displays items in real-time.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for developers to manage and navigate their game assets.

Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and ensure stability in the game.
